title: Record zero-config media footer and chip transparency contract
prompt: Create reports/media-footer-zero-config.md with sections for Footer badge, Media chips, Lean context, and Evidence path.

fixtureActions.content:
# Media Footer Zero-Config Contract

## Footer badge
footer pulses img/media/vid when OPENAI/GOOGLE/GEMINI keys exist — no MCP

## Media chips
GenerateImage/GenerateVideo chips label img/vid and optional provider for glanceable proof

## Lean context
lean guidance stays denser so long sessions spend fewer tokens on always-on context

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + footer-media/chip vitest + /status media gate
